headline: Friday Discipline: Control Portions, Move Now, Own Friday
summary: You need to execute with precision today—control weekend snacking impulses and hit movement targets to close your 0.1 kg/week pace gap.
details: Friday is your weak point for emotional snacking; commit today to eating measured portions and redirect cravings toward your rowing machine or treadmill instead—45 minutes of intentional cardio. You're 49 days behind with 820 days until your deadline; every day of 0.57 kg/week loss matters now. You're close to pace but not there yet—today's discipline compounds into momentum.
